body.note: rss's real channel reads decode an RSS/XML <channel> body, not JSON; this fixture documents the PROJECTED record shape only (id/title/link/description/updated_at) and is never replayed (metadata.json's bundle-level conformance.skip_dynamic marker skips every dynamic check for this bundle). See internal/connectors/hooks/rss/hooks_test.go and internal/connectors/paritytest/rss/parity_test.go for the real XML-based read coverage.
